message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: A lifecycle rule will abort incomplete multipart uploads after the configured number of days. Incomplete multipart uploads older than the configured number of days will be automatically aborted.

blocked_reasons: Lifecycle preservation evidence is missing for additive merge review.
resolution.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded S3.11 strategy 's3_enable_abort_incomplete_uploads' because additive lifecycle preservation is under-proven. AccessDenied Lifecycle preservation evidence is missing for additive merge review.
